findings.evidence: Football-Data local manifests and artifacts exist outside GitHub, but no canonical registry with backup/restore status is tracked.
findings.required_before_unlock: Create registry, backup copy, restore drill, and code/data compatibility binding.
findings.title: Historical data assets are not governed by durable W2DataAssetRegistryV1

findings.evidence: FutureRefreshService can execute provider calls and DB writes; Matchday V2 defines endpoint capture authority but live executor is gated.
findings.required_before_unlock: All provider paths must go through endpoint capture contract or be explicitly compatibility-only.
findings.title: Provider intake has two competing chains

findings.evidence: V2 policy exists, but future_fixture_refresh.v1 checkpoint_mode and matchday_schedule.v1/legacy constants remain present.
findings.required_before_unlock: Remove or demote older checkpoint authority after zero-caller proof.
findings.title: Checkpoint policy is not yet singular across scheduler/runtime/config

findings.evidence: WATCH/SKIP, ANALYSIS_PICK, FORMAL/LOCKED and V3 outcomes all have active code paths.
findings.required_before_unlock: Single canonical V3 decision_hash must feed API, Dashboard, tracking, lock, settlement and cohort.
findings.title: Recommendation states remain distributed across legacy, analysis, V3, reporting and Dashboard projection

findings.evidence: F5 local dataset exists, but manifest still says W2_CANONICAL_IMPORT_NOT_EXECUTED and W2_RUNTIME_F5_NOT_READY; F8 has static/artifact/DB surfaces.
findings.required_before_unlock: Import F5 canonical DB/query path and declare one reviewed F8 as-of authority.
findings.title: F5/F8 are not proven runtime-ready despite local/private artifacts

findings.evidence: This audit used GitHub/source/local private files only; no approved read-only staging SSH/container/DB evidence was captured.
findings.required_before_unlock: Run read-only runtime evidence capture with approved access and bind it to this matrix.
findings.title: Staging running SHA and DB state were not verified in this audit turn
